title: Change of Business Type from Sole Proprietorship/OPC/Partnership
content: 7 to Partnership/Corporation. The Department shall be notified of the change in the 8 business type from sole proprietorship/OPC to partnership or corporation, or from 9 partnership to corporation within thirty (30) calendar days from such change. The LMA 10 must submit the documentary requirements prescribed by the Department, after which 11 the Proponent/s shall be subjected to a confirmatory interview. 12 13
